/usr/lib/ccache/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libarch_nav_mavsdk_ardupilot.so -o libarch_nav_mavsdk_ardupilot.so CMakeFiles/arch_nav_mavsdk_ardupilot.dir/src/mavsdk_command_dispatcher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arch_nav_mavsdk_ardupilot.dir/src/mavsdk_platform_driver.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arch_nav_mavsdk_ardupilot.dir/src/mavsdk_config_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/arch_nav_mavsdk_ardupilot.dir/src/mavsdk_registration.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libarch_nav.so /usr/lib/libmavsdk.so.3.15.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.7.0 -ldl
